hooks.command: python -c "import os;print('[better-code-review-graph] Knowledge graph available. Prefer crg MCP tools (semantic_search_nodes, query_graph callers_of/callees_of/imports_of/importers_of/children_of/tests_for/inheritors_of/file_summary, get_impact_radius, get_review_context) before manual Grep/Glob/Read. Saves tokens.' if os.path.exists(os.path.join('.code-review-graph','graph.db')) else '[better-code-review-graph] No knowledge graph found. Use the graph tool action=build to enable graph-powered queries.')"
uvx --from better-code-review-graph python -c "from better_code_review_graph.incremental import incremental_update_from_hook; incremental_update_from_hook()" 2>/dev/null || true
